message:
fix: prevent sidebar close/minimize buttons from overflowing viewport (#3761) (#3773)

Split the mission sidebar header toolbar into two groups: optional
toolbar buttons (new mission, browse, mission control, agent selector,
font size) that can be clipped via overflow-hidden when the sidebar is
narrow, and essential window-control buttons (fullscreen, minimize,
close) that are flex-shrink-0 and always remain visible in the viewport.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
